pages.text: 今天是个大晴天！爸爸说："咘咘，我们去游乐场玩！"咘咘好开心好开心，蹦蹦跳跳出了门。
pages.text_en: What a sunny day! Daddy said, "Bubu, let's go to the playground!" Bubu was so happy, hopping all the way out the door.

pages.text: 咘咘坐上了旋转木马！小马转呀转，转呀转。咘咘笑得好大声："再转一圈！再转一圈！"
pages.text_en: Bubu rode the merry-go-round! The little horse went round and round. Bubu laughed so loud. "One more time! One more time!"

pages.text: 咘咘又坐了小飞机！飞机飞得好高好高。咘咘张开小手："我在飞！我在飞！"
pages.text_en: Then Bubu rode the little airplane! It flew so high! Bubu spread her arms. "I'm flying! I'm flying!"

pages.text: 咘咘和爸爸一起坐小火车。小火车开呀开，穿过小山洞。咘咘挥着手说："嘟嘟嘟！出发啦！"
pages.text_en: Bubu and Daddy rode the little train together. It went choo-choo through a tiny tunnel. Bubu waved her hand. "Choo choo! Off we go!"

pages.text: 哇！咘咘看到一个好大好大的彩虹滑梯！好高好高，好酷好酷！"爸爸，我想玩那个！"
pages.text_en: Wow! Bubu saw a great big rainbow slide! So tall and so cool! "Daddy, I want to go on that one!"

pages.text: 可是，滑梯旁边有个牌子：要一米二才能玩。咘咘踮起脚尖，使劲伸高——差一点点！
pages.text_en: But there was a sign next to the slide: you had to be 120cm tall. Bubu stood on her tippy-toes and stretched — just a little bit short!

pages.text: 咘咘的小耳朵耷拉下来了。"我不够高……我玩不了……"咘咘好难过。
pages.text_en: Bubu's little ears drooped down. "I'm not tall enough... I can't ride it..." Bubu felt so sad.

pages.text: 爸爸蹲下来，抱住咘咘说："没关系！多吃饭，多吃蔬菜，咘咘就会长高高！长到一米二，就能玩大滑梯啦！"
pages.text_en: Daddy knelt down and hugged Bubu. "That's okay! Eat lots of food and veggies, and Bubu will grow tall! When you reach 120cm, you can ride the big slide!"

pages.text: 回到家，咘咘自己爬上椅子。她大口大口吃米饭，大口大口吃蔬菜。"我要吃好多好多！"
pages.text_en: Back home, Bubu climbed into her chair. She ate big bites of rice and big bites of veggies. "I want to eat lots and lots!"

pages.text: 一碗米饭吃完了！青菜吃完了！胡萝卜也吃完了！碗里干干净净。爸爸竖起大拇指："咘咘真棒！"
pages.text_en: She finished a whole bowl of rice! The greens were gone! The carrots were gone! The bowl was sparkly clean. Daddy gave a thumbs up. "Great job, Bubu!"

pages.text:
咘咘拍拍小肚子，举起手说："我要快快长高高，去玩大滑梯！"

多吃饭，多吃菜，咘咘一定会长高高！🎢🥦🍚
pages.text_en:
Bubu patted her tummy and raised her hand. "I'm going to grow tall fast and ride the big slide!"

Eat more food, eat more veggies — Bubu will definitely grow tall! 🎢🥦🍚
